creator: ats@first.gmd.de
text:
jlint-2.1.tar.gz gives a checksum error if fetched from the 
mastersite. It seems like the tarball contains a newer version
of jlint. If i correct the checksum and try a make, the make fails
with can't cd to work/jlint. And under work is a directory jlint-2.2.

How-To-Repeat: ats@freebsd.first.gmd.de[59] make checksum
